summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an incredible 1989 Alpine Valley show.
review: The reviewer raves about both the performance and the audio, calling it an "incredible show" and praising Charlie Miller’s soundboard work as one of the best they’ve heard. While no specific songs are mentioned, the overall impression is that the concert shines musically and sounds crystal‑clear on this UltraMatrix recording.

ai_rating.rationale: A single, highly enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the soundboard quality, indicating an outstanding show with excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as one of the best soundboards ever heard; clear, crisp UltraMatrix mix praised by reviewer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer highlights overall performance excellence but does not single out specific songs or set‑list details.
